Notes: Game rescheduled from Jan. 22 due to inclement weather ... USciences ends
2-game losing streak ... Goldey-Beacom's 5th loss in last 6 games ... Brianne
Traub (USCI) posts 9th 20-point game and 4th "double double" of season ...
Lillian Chukwueze (GBC) scores 20+ points for 4th time this year.
Game.Officials: Michele Rolko (R),  Steve Bukowski,  Sabrina Isom
